ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin (e.g., MD30, MD29) */,
  "pin_number" INTEGER /* Number of the pin */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., In, Out) */,
  "isa_note" TEXT /* Note on ISA compatibility */,
  "pci_note" TEXT /* Note on PCI compatibility */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pin was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or product the configuration belongs to */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin in the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the pin was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_history_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isa_compatibilities" (
  "isa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISA compatibility entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin with ISA compatibility information */,
  "isa_note" TEXT /* Note on ISA compatibility */,
  "isa_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of ISA compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isa_compatibilities_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pci_compatibilities" (
  "pci_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PCI compatibility entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin with PCI compatibility information */,
  "pci_note" TEXT /* Note on PCI compatibility */,
  "pci_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of PCI compatibility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pci_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pci_compatibilities_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_changes_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_types" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input type */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin with input type information */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input type */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the input type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_types_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "output_types" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output type */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin with output type information */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output type */,
  "output_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the output type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_output_types_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
